angular leaf spot: A bean leaf with brown, angular lesions confined by veins, showing a tan center.

Foliage showing necrotic angular spots bounded by leaf veinlets.

A leaf of a bean plant showing orange-brown or rust-colored powdery lesions.
Underneath a bean leaf covered in circular rust pustules with a yellow chlorotic halo.
Bean foliage displaying rusty red-brown spore pustules on the green leaf surface.

healthy: A healthy green bean leaf with smooth, uniform green surface and no lesions.
A clean, bright green leaf of a bean plant free of any diseases, spots, or rust.
